findings.title: RAG Latency Spike
findings.symptom: P95 latency rises dramatically during simulation.
findings.root_cause: The retrieval step gets delayed due to slow database queries.

traces: Langfuse trace shows slow retrieval span taking over 2.5s

findings.fix: Enable caching in config.json and implement thread-safe caching in wrapper.py.

findings.title: Vector Store Timeout Errors
findings.symptom: Requests fail with 500 or wrapper_error status codes.
findings.root_cause: Retrieval tool raises timeout errors or connection drops under load.

traces: Langfuse trace shows failed database calls
logs: Logs contain RuntimeError: Vector store timeout

findings.fix: Implement auto-retry with exponential backoff and wrapper exceptions handling.

findings.title: Output Token Cost Blowup
findings.symptom: Cost metrics and token usage grow disproportionately.
findings.root_cause: The LLM generates overly verbose system responses or redundant reasoning.

traces: Traces show LLM calls consuming over 2000 output tokens
logs: Logs show high cost_usd per agent call

findings.fix: Set max completion token limits in config.json and shorten prompt instructions.

findings.title: Agent Infinite Loop
findings.symptom: Agent fails to respond and gets stuck in infinite execution loops.
findings.root_cause: Repeated identical tool calls executed due to poor stopping criteria.

traces: Traces show multiple duplicate calls to check_stock and calc_shipping
logs: Logs show status: loop or status: max_steps

findings.fix: Enable loop_guard: true and limit max_steps in config.json.

findings.title: PII Data Leakage
findings.symptom: Customer email addresses and phone numbers echoed in response answers.
findings.root_cause: LLM copies customer contact info from the prompt inputs into final output text.

traces: Traces show raw phone/email in final LLM response
logs: Redaction processor flags matching PII patterns in logs

findings.fix: Enable redact_pii in config.json and add regex redaction layer in wrapper.py.

findings.title: Arithmetic Errors in Totals
findings.symptom: Incorrect subtotal, discount, or shipping math in final responses.
findings.root_cause: LLM estimates calculations instead of exact floor division arithmetic.

logs: Calculated total does not match expected formula total

findings.fix: Lower temperature to 0.2 and instruct step-by-step arithmetic verification in prompt.txt.

findings.title: Tool Overuse Cost
findings.symptom: Excessive API calls per session leading to latency and cost spikes.
findings.root_cause: Agent calls identical tools multiple times unnecessarily 'to be safe'.

traces: Multiple check_stock calls for same product name
logs: Logs show redundant tools_used list entries

findings.fix: Limit tool_budget in config.json and instruct once-per-tool execution in prompt.txt.

findings.title: Product Price Fabrication
findings.symptom: Agent confidently creates totals for out-of-stock items.
findings.root_cause: LLM tries to satisfy the user request by hallucinating values when tools report false in_stock.

traces: LLM fabricates subtotal when check_stock reports in_stock: false
logs: Response contains pricing details for unavailable items

findings.fix: Explicitly prompt the model to refuse and output no total when items are out of stock.

findings.title: Unicode and City Name Tool Failures
findings.symptom: Shipping calculation fails for Vietnamese cities containing diacritics.
findings.root_cause: Unicode encoding mismatches when calling calc_shipping with non-normalized strings.

traces: Tool call raises error for cities with diacritics like Hà Nội, Đà Nẵng

findings.fix: Enable normalize_unicode: true in config.json to normalize city text inputs.

findings.title: Quality Drift Over Long Sessions
findings.symptom: Agent response accuracy degrades in late turns of long user sessions.
findings.root_cause: Context window accumulates noise over many session turns, causing drift.

traces: Traces show quality loss in high turn_index steps
logs: Error/incorrect answer rates rise in higher turn counts

findings.fix: Enable context_reset_every or configure session_drift_rate parameters in config.json.
